allow: Bash(python -c " import inspect from starlette.security import HTTPBearer, HTTPAuthorizationCredentials import starlette.security as sec print\(inspect.getsource\(HTTPBearer.__call__\)\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Token OK:', bool\(d.get\('access_token'\)\)\); print\('User role:', d.get\('user',{}\).get\('role'\)\)")
